narrative_md:
Your **save rate dropped 18%** this week, driven by carousel posts about [productivity tips](route:/dashboard/content). On the upside, your Reel on [morning routines](route:/dashboard/reels) outperformed your average reach by **3.2×** — strong candidate for a series.

Follower quality stayed flat. Posting cadence drifted to 11pm — earlier in the day still wins on reach for your audience.

bullets.headline: Morning Routine Reel hit 3.2× avg reach
bullets.detail_md: Reach 42.1k vs your 60-day median of 13.2k. Hook was a direct question; replicate the framing.

bullets.headline: Carousel save rate ↓ 18% WoW
bullets.detail_md: Your save rate on carousels was 0.9% (vs 1.1% prior week). Topic shift from tactical → motivational correlates with the drop.

bullets.headline: Audience time-of-day shifting later
bullets.detail_md: Engagement peak moved from 8pm to 9:30pm. Consider testing later slots.

bullets.headline: Try a 3-part Reel series on morning routines
bullets.detail_md: Your top post this week was on this theme. A series will compound retention.

followups: Pin the morning-routine Reel to your grid
Cut the carousel topic that flopped from this week's plan
